text:
is the 81st chapter of Fullmetal Alchemist.

Synopsis

Chapter Notes

This chapter's Japanese title, Baribari no Zenkai (バリバリの全開), translates roughly to mean "fired up" or "charged with energy" and reflects Edward's last line in the chapter. As the line was changed for the American release, so too was the chapter's title. The 2009 anime series translates the phrase as "Revving at Full Throttle".
